items.name: Grilled Chicken Chop
items.description: Marinated thigh, char-grilled and finished with house black pepper sauce. Served with fries and coleslaw.

items.name: Fish & Chips
items.description: Golden crispy battered fillet with thick-cut fries, a lemon wedge, and tartar sauce on the side.

items.name: Classic Beef Burger
items.description: Juicy beef patty with fresh lettuce, tomato, melted cheese, and our house sauce. Served with fries.

items.name: Creamy Carbonara
items.description: Silky cream reduction with crispy chicken bacon, sauteed mushrooms, and a shower of parmesan.

items.name: Pesto Chicken Pasta
items.description: Spaghetti tossed in house-made basil pesto with grilled chicken breast and blistered cherry tomatoes.

items.name: Korean Fried Chicken Rice
items.description: Crispy fried chicken glazed in sweet-spicy gochujang sauce, served over rice with egg and greens.

items.name: Salted Egg Chicken Rice
items.description: Crunchy fried chicken tossed in rich, fragrant salted egg yolk sauce over steamed rice.

items.name: Chicken Chop Rice Set
items.description: Grilled chicken with garlic fried rice, a sunny side up, and seasonal vegetables.

items.name: Nasi Lemak Special
items.description: Fragrant coconut rice with sambal, spring onions, crispy anchovies, and your choice of protein.

items.name: Braised Chicken Rice Set
items.description: Traditional braised chicken with pickled vegetables, egg, and fragrant steamed rice on a wooden tray.

items.name: Chicken Sausage Rice Bowl
items.description: Sliced chicken sausage with crispy shredded chicken, fresh greens, and a sunny side up.

items.name: Oreo Waffle
items.description: Belgian waffle, still warm from the iron. Topped with crushed Oreos, chocolate drizzle, and vanilla ice cream.

items.name: Butterfly Pea Latte
items.description: Colour-changing butterfly pea flower tea layered with creamy milk. Beautiful, refreshing, and caffeine-free.

items.name: Butterfly Boba Tea
items.description: Butterfly pea tea with chewy tapioca pearls and a splash of cream. A playful twist on a classic.

items.name: Passion Fruit Soda
items.description: House-made passion fruit syrup with sparkling soda and a gradient of tropical colours.
